response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience with direct overlap on the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB), current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling matching the AI agent requirement, and a strong track record of ownership across web, mobile, and embedded systems. Craftsmanship signals (TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, workshops/talks) align well with a mid-senior IC role focused on internal automation tooling.
strengths: Direct match on TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB with 6+ years senior experience
Active AI-agent and MCP tooling work at current role
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, open-source ownership
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Limited Kotlin exposure for the secondary backend stack
Cloud experience skews AWS; no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth shown beyond GISCollective
